title: RC7227 Elections or Revocation of the Elections to Deem Certain Supplies to be Financial Services for GST/HST and QST Purposes for Selected Listed Financial Institutions - Canada.ca
content:
## RC7227 Elections or Revocation of the Elections to Deem Certain Supplies to be Financial Services for GST/HST and QST Purposes for Selected Listed Financial Institutions

## Notice to the reader
You can submit your request electronically using the “File an election” service in My Business Account or Represent a Client .
You must download the accessible fillable PDF to your computer. Use Acrobat Reader 10 or later to open the file. Do not click the link to open it in your web browser.
- Download and save the PDF to your computer
- Open the downloaded PDF in Acrobat Reader 10 or later
Use this form if you are a corporation that is a selected listed financial institution (SLFI) for QST purposes, you are a member of a closely related group, you want to jointly elect or revoke the elections with another member of the closely related group to have certain taxable supplies treated as supplies of financial services for GST/HST and QST purposes and you are the electing member with the earliest date that a GST/HST and QST return for the reporting period (that includes the effective date of the elections) is required to be filed.

## Ways to get the form
- Download and fill out with Acrobat Reader You must download and open fillable PDFs in Acrobat Reader 10 or higher. Accessible Fillable PDF (rc7227-fill-22e.pdf)

### Download and fill out with Acrobat Reader
You must download and open fillable PDFs in Acrobat Reader 10 or higher.
- Accessible Fillable PDF (rc7227-fill-22e.pdf)
- Print and fill out by hand Standard print PDF (rc7227-22e.pdf)

### Print and fill out by hand
- Standard print PDF (rc7227-22e.pdf)
- Ask for an alternate format You can order alternate formats such as digital audio, electronic text, braille, and large print. Order alternate formats for persons with disabilities

### Ask for an alternate format
You can order alternate formats such as digital audio, electronic text, braille, and large print.
- Order alternate formats for persons with disabilities

### Give feedback about this page
Thank you for your feedback.
